description_long: This is a modern, boxy house with a flat roof and a rooftop garden featuring several trees and greenery. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color, with large rectangular windows arranged in both single and paired configurations. The house has a prominent glass-roofed section on the upper level, likely serving as a sunroom or greenhouse, and a partially covered balcony or porch area at the ground level. The rear and side facades are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms. The rooftop garden adds a touch of nature to the otherwise urban and contemporary structure.
description: A modern, box-shaped house with a flat roof, rooftop garden, large windows, and a minimalist light exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with a glass-roofed upper section, rooftop garden, and ground-level porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall with minimal windows and the open rooftop terrace area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall and the full extent of the rooftop garden and glass structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more windows and a clear view of the covered porch and rooftop greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a covered porch, supported by columns, and minimal decorative elements
